hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | head -1 | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]]|&&[[:space:]]*|;[[:space:]]*|\|[[:space:]]*)gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+create\b' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A pull request was just created. You MUST now run the /review-pr command to fan out the four code reviewers, then pr-fix-applier, then pr-readme-updater, and post one structured comment. Use the PR number from the gh pr create output. The command body lives at .claude/commands/review-pr.md — read and follow it."}}' || true
